sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hash (id UInt64, text String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_hash VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse is a fast open-source OLAP database.');
SELECT wordShingleSimHashUTF8(text, 5) AS Hash FROM test_hash WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_hash SET text = 'ClickHouse supports real-time data processing.' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, wordShingleSimHashUTF8(text) AS SimHash FROM test_hash;
